BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-23-2004 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $312.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $2,279.17 AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANZO, CARL ANTHONY INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ACCURATE AUTO
DECLARATION RE COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD. ( EVID CODE 1521,1550 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY COURT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSTANZO, CARL ANTHONY INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ACCURATE AUTO POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 USED BINKS PREP STATION ; 1 BINKS DRAFT PAINT BOOTH ( FAIR MARKET VALUE $6,000.00 ), OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $628.32, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $19,289.23 DAMAGES, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $312.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,101.73, $ 628.32 IS THE INTEREST . SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT . * * * THIS JUDGMENT WAS AMENDED TO REFLECT THAT DEFENDANT CONSTANZO'S NAME SHOULD BE COSTANZO [SEE ORDER CORRECTING THIS FILED ON MAY 21, 2004)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF MOTION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT AND AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-29-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION, MOTION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT AND AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ORDER CORRECTING CLERICAL ERROR AND AMENDING JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC TO REFLECT THAT DEFENDANT'S NAME SHOULD BE COSTANZO INSTEAD OF CONSTANZO
AMENDED DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (NUNC PRO TUNC TO JANUARY 28, 2004) CHANGING DEFENDANT CONSTANZO'S NAME TO COSTANZO
